name: Russ Feingold
subject: I hope I made you proud, team
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Thank you for being part of my grassroots team. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4611/1c469400/51cd37/357fce7/4144451296/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-debate-nd?utm_source=ema_2016-10-14_russ_final_d7_nd&refcode=2016-10-14_russ_final_d7_nd&utm_campaign=russ_d7&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I just got off the stage after tonight's debate, and I'm fired up. Tonight's debate captured the stark contrast between my campaign and Senator Johnson's. **This week's polls had our campaigns within the margin of error.** I know we have the momentum it's going to take to win this race -- but we can't afford to take anything for granted. I want to fight for our shared progressive values in the Senate, but I can only get there with your help. It has never been more important that we win this, together. So, I'm asking: **[Help us keep up tonight's momentum with a donation of $5. We can't afford to lose another minute.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4611/1c469400/51cd37/357fce4/4144451296/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-debate-nd?utm_source=ema_2016-10-14_russ_final_d7_nd&refcode=2016-10-14_russ_final_d7_nd&utm_campaign=russ_d6&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4611/1c469400/51cd37/357fce5/4144451296/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-debate-nd?utm_source=ema_2016-10-14_russ_final_d7_nd&refcode=2016-10-14_russ_final_d7_nd&utm_campaign=russ_d7&express_lane=true&amount=5")

name: Trey Gowdy
subject: Please, Peter, keep this private...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016
body:
I cannot overstate how critical this election is, and I cannot emphasize enough that no matter what state you live in, Marco's race impacts you. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38143867:spLl90bNT:m:1:1353064270:4518A88453245FCCC324D93E46865912:r)
---
Peter,

**I just talked to Marco Rubio and wanted you to know what is happening in Florida and what Marco is up against.**

Marco is facing a very tough re-election campaign. Harry Reid's primary mission is to retake the Senate. Literally control over the US Senate may come down to Florida. What's at stake? Supreme Court Justices. Cabinet level appointments. And who controls the agenda.

**I cannot overstate how critical this election is, and I cannot emphasize enough that no matter what state you live in, Marco's race impacts you.**

If Marco loses, liberal Democrats will control not only the agenda but also preside over the critically important Senate Committees -- like Judiciary, Armed Service, Senate Intelligence and Veteran's Affairs.

That's why I'm emailing you today. Marco and I both consider you a good friend, and I know we have asked for your help before, but it's never been as critical as it is today.

Marco's campaign has set a goal to raise 1 Million by their October 15th fundraising deadline and [**they are need our immediate help to raise it.** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38143867:spLl90bNT:m:1:1353064270:4518A88453245FCCC324D93E46865912:r)

[ **Can Marco count on you, Peter, to chip in right now?** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38143867:spLl90bNT:m:1:1353064270:4518A88453245FCCC324D93E46865912:r)

[**Peter's
🚨 Marco Rubio Donation 🚨
_Donate Now >>>_**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38143867:spLl90bNT:m:1:1353064270:4518A88453245FCCC324D93E46865912:r)
Marco's voice and vote in the Senate are crucial to the future of our nation. He is a stalwart supporter of the conservative values that you and I hold dear, [**and we must do whatever it takes to make certain Marco wins re-election.** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38143867:spLl90bNT:m:1:1353064270:4518A88453245FCCC324D93E46865912:r)

[**Peter's
🚨 Marco Rubio Donation 🚨
_Donate Now >>>_**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38143867:spLl90bNT:m:1:1353064270:4518A88453245FCCC324D93E46865912:r)
No matter what state you live in, the election in Florida matters to you. The balance of the Senate hangs on the outcome of this election in Florida. We MUST hold on to Florida and keep Marco working for our nation's future.

[ **I hope you will join me in standing up for Marco.** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38143867:spLl90bNT:m:1:1353064270:4518A88453245FCCC324D93E46865912:r)

Thanks,
Trey Gowdy

P.S. Democrats have announced an advertising budget in these final September days grossing over ten million dollars. Peter, Marco MUST be able to fight back and [**I hope he will have your help to do so.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38143867:spLl90bNT:m:1:1353064270:4518A88453245FCCC324D93E46865912:r) Thank you for all you have done.

subject: This is our final debate

body:
Peter,

When you watched the last debate, was there one single moment
that you loved?

Is there something you want me to say when I face Hillary for the
last time in just 4 days?

I'm asking you to provide your input as I prepare for the FINAL
debate with Hillary Clinton.

Please take the Final TRUMP Debate Preparation to have a say in
our campaign's debate preparation.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49244795:Jg7JwYmNr:m:3:1516426255:89494C87CBCF8A778B1E7B518FC98B73:r

You can weigh in on what you thought worked during this last
debate and what we still need to do win over the hearts of
undecided voters during this final stretch of our campaign.

This is your chance to have a voice in the most critical election
of our lifetime.

After this debate, there will be no turning back.

We only have this one last night to make the case to America that
we are ready to lead our country back to greatness.

I want to be sure we hit every single important point. And I need
your help weighing in to ensure that NOTHING is left out of our
debate preparation.

Please take the Final TRUMP Debate Preparation Survey
immediately.

Team, there are only a few hours left until our mid-October fundraising deadline -- but we're still **$15,724 short** of our goal.

[**Hurry, can you pitch in $5 or more before midnight? If we don 't close the gap before the deadline, we might not be able to recover in time. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4868105465898205184/-3963986808248729600?refcode=e20161015&refcode2=e20161015nd&amount=25)
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4868105465898205184/-3963986808248729600?refcode=e20161015&refcode2=e20161015nd&amount=25)

**[Deadline: Donate now>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4868105465898205184/-3963986808248729600?refcode=e20161015&refcode2=e20161015nd&amount=25)**
The _RealClearPolitics_ Polling Average yesterday showed this race is within ONE point. We need to turn out every single undecided voter before Election Day if we're going to come out on top -- and that means we urgently need your help.

**Toomey won his seat in the last election by just 2%. Do the math -- that's fewer than 9 votes per voting precinct.**

This race is shaping up to be __even closer__. We need to give it everything we've got over the next 24 short days if we're going to help Katie win.

[**Pitch in to help us reach our mid-month goal before the deadline ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4868105465898205184/-3963986808248729600?refcode=e20161015&refcode2=e20161015nd&amount=25)

Can't be closer,

McGinty HQ

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 24 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/4868105465898205184/-3963986808248729600?refcode=e20161015&refcode2=e20161015nd&amount=25)**

body:
Let’s win this race and get to work – we’ll Make America Great Again! With just 24 days to go your involvement is crucial. |

Friend, Did you watch the debate on Sunday night? I said it then, and I’m saying it again now – Hillary Clinton is all talk and NO action. She’s the ultimate career politician, enriching herself off of the rigged system for decades while getting NOTHING accomplished. I’m sick and tired of the failed career politicians, and I know you are too. And that’s why I’m running for our nation’s highest office – to get things done for YOU, your family, your community and our country. I need you standing with me to WIN this election, so we can get to work and Make America Great Again – please JOIN Team Trump today. JOIN NOW Hillary Clinton talks a big game about all sorts of wonderful things she says she’ll do for you, but just like all career politicians it means nothing. It’s just words. I know I can get big things done for our country, because that’s my track record. I make things happen, and I come in ahead of schedule and under budget – from the Wollman Rink in Central Park back in 1986, to my current redevelopment of the Old Post Office building on Pennsylvania Avenue in Washington, D.C. And that’s exactly what I’ll do as President of the United States. JOIN NOW If I win, we’ll negotiate better trade deals and bring back jobs. We’ll cut taxes and repeal Obamacare. We’ll hunt down ISIS and wipe them out for good. And, as I promised on Sunday, if elected I will appoint a special prosecutor to look into Crooked Hillary’s emails and get the answers the American people deserve. We’re in the final weeks of the campaign and we can’t let up for a moment. I need you on board now more than ever. Every contribution will help us put more ads on the air, reach more voters and WIN. Join Team Trump today with a $100, $75, $50, $35, $20, $10 or $5 contribution. Best wishes, Donald J. Trump P.S. You know I don’t resemble the all talk, no action career politicians like Hillary Clinton. I’ve been getting things done for decades, ahead of schedule and under budget, and that’s what I’ll do in the White House. Stand with me at this critical time so we can Make America Great Again – thank you. JOIN NOW

name: TEAM COLE
subject: Praise for Bill's Plan

body:
| |
---
| Friend --

Reaction from Tuesday's debate has been overwhelming for Bill because he laid out a clear vision to move West Virginia forward. You can read up on Bill's plan [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/issues?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=inter_mountain&n=1).

As a result, Bill has received the first newspaper endorsement in the race for Governor today from _The_ _Inter Mountain_ in Elkins. They said it best in reaction to the debate:
"Reform. Policy. Fiscal responsibility. Leadership. Those are words that fit Cole. Justice? Try vague promises and an alliance with the very old-style politicians who are the problem. The _Inter Mountain_ endorses Bill Cole for governor of West Virginia for one reason: He has led reform and, as governor, will deliver real progress — not just promises." You can read the entire endorsement [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/elect_cole_for_real_progress?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=inter_mountain&n=2).

The Intelligencer had a great recap of the debate in today's paper. They said:
"What West Virginians need now is, if you will, a mechanic. We need someone in the governor’s office willing to get elbow-deep in the greasy business of repairing state government to make us a place where the furniture manufacturers and theme park developers want to come. Cole has had substantial success in doing just that while president of the state Senate. Clearly, he could accomplish much more as governor."

You can read the full column [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/bringing_more_jobs_to_w_va?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=inter_mountain&n=3).

One thing is clear after the debate: Bill Cole has a plan to move West Virginia forward. Jim Justice is offering recycled slogans from the "good ole boy" machine that has left us last.

| **_Real Clear Politics_ just moved our race from "Leans Republican" to a "Toss Up."**

What's that mean for us? First, it means that this race is tightening in the final weeks. No surprise there.

Second, it means that Marco Rubio and his special interest backers will get even more nervous than they already were. When they get nervous, they spend money. And we're _already_ being hugely outspent.

Third and most importantly: **The resources to counter that special interest spending have to come from you.** I rely on you. Rubio relies on outside groups like the Kochs' Super PAC and the NRA. I rely on you.

Our Mid Month deadline is 12 hours away and we're still short. [_**Can you rush in a contribution before it 's too late? Your gift will be matched.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2db3/738133e4/32f9eb1e/7f856afa/645524827/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161015?refcode=pme161015_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: real change:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, I first met Chris discussing our different musical tastes, favorite movies and yes -- debating nuclear weapons policy and the nuclear freeze movement. Little did I know that 30 years later his passion to make our communities and our world a safer and better place would still be a defining theme of our lives together.

But I should have guessed, because Chris has always been a strong believer that government can be an important force for good. Sadly, we are living in a time when the radical ideology of groups like the Tea Party are undermining faith in our democracy. For the last 6 years Republican control of the Congress has enabled these extremists to control the agenda and block efforts to make progress.

That's why Washington Republicans and their big-money friends are determined not to lose their majority. They're trying to turn the tide of this election in races across the country--and Maryland won't be an exception.

Over the past few months, top Republicans like Scott Walker and Carly Fiorina have been helping fund our Republican opponent's agenda. They -- just like the NRA and a shady SuperPAC that has already started attacking Chris -- know that our opponent will stand with them if she's elected.

Chris won't.

Chris has spent his time in public service fighting to keep dark money out of politics and end gun violence, and advancing the issues that matter most to the people of Maryland. And when he's elected to the U.S. Senate, his opponent's big-money friends know that he'll keep fighting for our values and priorities.

Early voting begins in Maryland in less than 30 days, friend. Will you chip in $ or whatever you can right now to help keep us reach our September goal before Friday's FEC deadline?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Donate $5 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $10 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $25 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $50 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $100 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $200 to stand with Chris >>>

Or donate another amount to stand with Chris >>>

Polls show that 19% of the electorate in Maryland is still undecided. We need to do better than that. With less than one month until early voting we must do everything we can to turn out as many voters as we possible and move our state and our country forward.

Thank you for being part of this,

Katherine
Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
You're receiving this email at: dpwillis67@gmail.com
If you'd like to unsubscribe visit: http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe

body:
Friend, this Presidential election has made me dig deep.
I often find myself at a loss for words to describe this man at the top of the Republican ticket. This unhinged, misogynistic, race-baiting, xenophobic man -- who admitted to sexual assault -- then verbally attacked the women who came forward to speak their truth.
Now I'll admit, it's easy in moments like this to be discouraged, to think "what can we do?" when many in our country support him -- Senators, members of Congress, supposed "leaders" in the Republican Party -- no matter what he does.
**I want you to know, you don 't have to feel that way because we have the power to stop him.**
We have a leader who is taking on Trump for us, and we have women running for the Senate who will hold those Republicans accountable who enabled this man to get this far. But they cannot win unless we support them now. These elections are close -- too close -- so every dollar you can give will be the difference.
[**Rush a donation to Hillary Clinton, Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, and Deborah Ross right now so we can defeat Trump and take back the Senate.**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff45/767134fb/5c326a85/4338164a/1022292709/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/defeattrumpandhisenablers?refcode=donnaedwards")
[**Hillary Clinton**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff45/767134fb/5c326a85/4338164a/1022292709/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/defeattrumpandhisenablers?refcode=donnaedwards") has spent her life fighting for women and families. And she is the only person running for President with a plan to make college affordable, fight poverty, protect women's rights, and create jobs up and down the income ladder. I know when I was watching the last debate I saw one President on that stage, and she was strong for us.
[**Catherine Cortez Masto**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff45/767134fb/5c326a85/4338164a/1022292709/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/defeattrumpandhisenablers?refcode=donnaedwards") took on the big banks and created the Mortgage Fraud Strike force to hold accountable anyone trying to take advantage of middle-class families. Then, she took on the big banks again and won an estimated $1.9 billion for Nevada families as part of the National Mortgage Settlement. She will fight that hard for all of us when she gets to the Senate.
[**Maggie Hassan**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff45/767134fb/5c326a85/4338164a/1022292709/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/defeattrumpandhisenablers?refcode=donnaedwards") is a friend of mine, a former governor of New Hampshire, and someone all of us can count on. Her opponent called Donald Trump a "role model" for our children. This is one of the most important Senate races in the country and is within 1 or 2 points -- every dollar will make a huge difference.
[**Deborah Ross**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff45/767134fb/5c326a85/4338164a/1022292709/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/defeattrumpandhisenablers?refcode=donnaedwards") knows the value of public service. Her dad was in the Air Force, like mine, and her values are our progressive values. My home state of North Carolina could be the key to winning back the Senate, and I know if you pitch in towards her campaign she will make us all proud to be a part of her campaign.
[**Please rush a donation now -- this is not a time to sit on the sidelines. Hillary, Catherine, Maggie, and Deborah need our help if they are going to win and send a message to the country that Donald Trump is not who WE are.**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff45/767134fb/5c326a85/4338164a/1022292709/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/defeattrumpandhisenablers?refcode=donnaedwards")
Thank you for fighting with me,
Donna

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you would like to receive less email, please [click here](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff45/767134fb/5c326a85/4338164b/1022292709/VEsB/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/s/receive-less-email"). Email is the best way to stay in contact with supporters like you, but if you wish to unsubscribe from all emails, please [click here.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff45/767134fb/5c326a85/43381648/1022292709/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
Donna Edwards for Senate
P.O Box 44305
Ft. Washington, MD 20749

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Making our numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We're not taking any vote for granted. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTY5NzY2NAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTE5NDc0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, We're closing in on our critical midnight fundraising deadline -- [**and I 'm asking for your help to hit our goal.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTY5NzY2NAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTE5NDc0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) Here's why our goal is so important:
* This time next week, voters across our state will be casting their ballots. That means tens of thousands of our friends and neighbors are already deciding on their choice for governor and other races up and down the ballot.
* Our opponent went up with deceptive attack ads on TV that ignore our record of progress in Washington.
* Winning the right way -- with a bold field program -- isn't just critical to me, it's how we'll win up and down the ballot from the White House to local races across Washington.

| | Hi there,

This has been a rough week for people who love politics.

But here's the thing: In 24 days, we're going to elect the first woman president -- a woman who is tough as hell, as smart as they come, and a lot cooler than she often gets credit for.

Today we're launching #HillaryBecause, a new project to celebrate Hillary and everything she stands for. #HillaryBecause will feature a collection of our favorite reasons to vote for her, straight from the EMILY's List community.

**[Check out our first round of graphics on Facebook and share your favorites today.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0a57/24c69fd9/f06168f/18eacf51/3595097816/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist/posts/10154512780977435?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Check+out+our+first+round+of+graphics+on&utm_campaign=WPENEV38N_digital_email_20161015_HillaryBecause_n-all&source=WPENEV38N_digital_email_20161015_HillaryBecause_n-all")** [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0a57/24c69fd9/f06168f/18eacf52/3595097816/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist/posts/10154512780977435?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WPENEV38N_digital_email_20161015_HillaryBecause_n-all&source=WPENEV38N_digital_email_20161015_HillaryBecause_n-all") The idea for #HillaryBecause came from a simple idea: If a friend or family member asked you right now why you're voting for Hillary, what would you tell them?

We're sharing the real talk about why women and men support Hillary.

We'll be releasing a new graphic (and reason!) every day from now until Election Day, so keep an eye on our Facebook and Twitter feeds for the latest.

I, for one, can't wait to cast my ballot for such an incredible person to be our first woman president.

**Check out #HillaryBecause on Facebook, then share your favorite reasons with your friends today:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Share-Hillary-Because](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0a57/24c69fd9/f06168f/18eacf53/3595097816/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist/posts/10154512780977435?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgShareHillaryBeca&utm_campaign=WPENEV38N_digital_email_20161015_HillaryBecause_n-all&source=WPENEV38N_digital_email_20161015_HillaryBecause_n-all")**

Thanks,

Caitlin Mitchell

there are only 24 days left and we need your help. |

Friend, we are in the critical, final days of the election, and Donald Trump and our House and Senate candidates need your help. A record number of Republicans showed up to vote in the primaries and we have a chance to turn those voters out and elect Donald Trump President of the United States, preserve our Senate Majority and elect more Republicans to the House. I know you understand how important this opportunity is for our country and that is why we need your help to win. With early voting already underway, we must do everything in our power NOW to reach voters and get GOP ads on the airwaves. Friend, I would like to humbly ask you today for a special Get-Out-The-Vote gift of $35, $50, $100, $250 or even just $5. Without a strong push to carry our message of strength, prosperity and freedom we could lose on Election Day. Mr. Trump and all our candidates nationwide count on your vote and financial help to win. I want them all to know that the grassroots of our party are standing with them in this battle to Make America Great Again. Please join me now with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, $250 or even just $5 and let’s take our country back. There is so much on the line over these last weeks, I hope you’re with us. | | Friend

Yesterday [I addressed the Seattle City Council](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=bfe30c3e66&e=32f1a3df98) on their proposed ordinance to allow people experiencing homelessness to camp in our children's parks and on 167 miles of city sidewalks - **a proposal I firmly oppose.**

The [Seattle Times was there](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=1b66dfd505&e=32f1a3df98) and opened their article as such: _"Here’s how angry the overflow crowd was at a Seattle City Hall hearing on homeless camping policies: Republican candidate for governor Bill Bryant received an ovation for declaring there should be zero tolerance for camping on public property._ _That’s akin to Tom Brady getting a rousing cheer at CenturyLink Field."_

**Go ahead and read that again.

Our message is resonating with voters throughout our state and across party lines**. Now all we need is your help. This week [I released my second ad for the General Election](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=49501f41da&e=32f1a3df98), an ad focused on addressing mental health and homelessness. Will you help me keep this ad running on television and online by [rushing us a $25, $75, or $150 contribution](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=6e6ea58a9d&e=32f1a3df98)? Our message is working, we're winning over people no one thought we would, and with your support I know we can win in November.

**Bill Bryant**
